testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 Full Lifecycle E2E Test › should execute a complete lifecycle of all core screens using getByTestId
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › acos.spec.ts:4:3 › ACOS 2.0 Full Lifecycle E2E Test › should execute a complete lifecycle of all core screens using getByTestId
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('boardroom-screen') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByTestId('boardroom-screen')
44 | 45 | // Verify Boardroom (loading state) is rendered > 46 | await expect(page.getByTestId('boardroom-screen')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 47 | 48 | // Verify Result Dashboard is rendered (waiting for multi-agent simulation completion) 49 | await expect(page.getByTestId('result-dashboard')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 60000 }); at /app/applet/tests/e2e/acos.spec.ts:46:56
attachment #1: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/acos-ACOS-2-0-Full-Lifecyc-68804-e-screens-using-getByTestId-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
